key_insights.insight: Inability to produce ketones during fasting may indicate a liver issue.
key_insights.quote: If you can't make ketones or you're starving would be another or you're you know, after a long period you're not feeling the benefits of fasting that could be because of your liver.

key_insights.insight: The speed at which your liver metabolizes toxins, such as alcohol, can indicate its health, with faster metabolism generally being better.
key_insights.quote: So it's how quickly are you able to metabolize a toxin in your system and get it out of you.

key_insights.insight: Yellowing in the inner corner of the eyes may suggest liver stagnation.
key_insights.quote: If the inside of your eye is yellow, according to iridology...when the corner of the eye is yellow, that can be a sign of liver stagnation.

key_insights.insight: Dry and cracking skin on the bottom of the feet can indicate poor circulation due to the liver not detoxing efficiently.
key_insights.quote: Bottom of your feet when they're dry and cracking is showing that you're not getting proper circulation down to your feet...the liver is not doing a good job of detoxing.

key_insights.insight: The color of your tongue (white or black) during fasting can indicate Candida (yeast) die-off; continue fasting until it turns pink.
key_insights.quote: If it's white and it's black and it's getting worse, keep going. If you can keep going until it starts to turn pink.

key_insights.insight: Ridges on fingernails can be a sign of mineral deficiency.
key_insights.quote: When there's a lot of ridges in your nails or how quickly your nails are growing, that can be a sign of mineral deficiency.

key_insights.insight: Foods from regenerative farms are more nutrient-dense than those from conventional farming due to better soil quality.
key_insights.quote: When you are actually eating food from regenerative farms, you're getting the minerals that you need into your system.

actionable_advice.advice: Monitor ketone production during fasting using a ketone reader.
actionable_advice.how_to: Purchase a ketone monitor, prick your finger, and place the blood on a test strip inserted into the monitor to measure ketone levels.

actionable_advice.advice: Periodically inspect the inner corner of your eyes for yellowing.
actionable_advice.how_to: Look in the mirror throughout the day to check for any yellow tinge in the inner corner of your eyes, next to your nose.

actionable_advice.advice: Examine the bottom of your feet for dryness and cracks.
actionable_advice.how_to: Regularly check the skin on the soles of your feet for signs of dryness, cracking, and poor circulation.

actionable_advice.advice: Check your tongue every morning for color changes.
actionable_advice.how_to: Upon waking, observe your tongue in the mirror for a white or black coating, which may indicate Candida overgrowth.

actionable_advice.advice: Prioritize fruits and vegetables from regenerative farms.
actionable_advice.how_to: Source produce from local farmers markets, co-ops, or directly from farms employing regenerative agricultural practices.

memorable_stories: Description of community fasts where participants monitor their tongue to determine when to break their fast.
contrarian_claims: Metabolizing alcohol quickly is better than slowly processing it, suggesting the person who gets 'hammered' has a healthier liver function than the one who seems unaffected.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Moment 199: 5 Warning Signs Your Body Needs More Nutrients: Mindy Pelz
